for a given year. Claim lines for other carrier/DME claims are a subset of the claims in the Part B carrier 
and DME data files. Types of services which may have been summarized in this other carrier category 
(OTHC) include ambulance, chiropractor, chemotherapy, vision, hearing, and speech services, etc. 

The total Primary Payer Payments are calculated as the sum of the LINE_BENE_PRMRY_PYR_PD_AMT. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: OTHC_PRMRY_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12
